name: Bruna 16x20 Shed Plan - A Classic Gable Shed with a Spacious Covered Porch
open_features: Timeless rooflines meet modern proportions - plus a full front porch perfect for seating, decor, and outdoor enjoyment.
Straightforward framing, simple geometry, and easy-to-follow plans make this design accessible for new and seasoned builders.
Classic barn-style double doors allow smooth entry for furniture, tools, equipment, or studio supplies.
Horizontal lap siding, crisp trim, warm wood accents, and a welcoming porch create a perfect blend of charm and practicality.
description_summary: Kickstart your next backyard upgrade with the Bruna Shed Plan - a 16x20 classic-meets-modern storage and workspace solution designed for comfort, style, and easy buildability. With its charming gable roof, full-width covered porch, timeless double doors, and beautiful horizontal siding, the Bruna blends traditional architecture with fresh contemporary appeal. Whether you're creating a spacious workshop, garden hub, backyard office, hobby studio, or a welcoming guest retreat, the Bruna 16x20 o...
